author: Vincent Voyer
subject: docs(org): ensure /v2/index.html still works while reorg (#2437)
body:
Before this fix, when we would deploy the new org (v1, v2) to the live
website, links to /v2/ could endup in a 404. With this fix it will not
and I will at the same time activate a rule to redirect /v2/ (homepage) to /.
